rootCause: Remote smoke live-chat used a clean Playwright browser context with no persisted OpenAI settings, so the chat request path could land in the error branch even while manual prod chat worked in a normal browser session with configured credentials.
resolution: Added a test-scoped credential-free default for remote smoke live-chat by stubbing the OpenAI client in the smoke spec, preserving real send/receive UI assertions. Added explicit opt-in real backend mode via --chat-live-backend=real and REMOTE_SMOKE_CHAT_API_KEY for terminal-driven credential validation.
